title: Miconia diguensis
taxonomy: Miconia diguensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to Peru and is part of the Miconia genus, which comprises over 1,000 species of plants. Miconia diguensis is a small shrub or tree that is often found in the Andean cloud forests of South America. Within the Miconia genus, Miconia diguensis is classified as a member of the Miconia sect. Cephalotomium. The exact classification of Miconia diguensis is still a subject of ongoing research and study.
